content: The official Art-Net 4 revision 1.4dp specifies 15-bit Port-Addressing, ArtDmx sequence values 1 through 255 with zero disabling sequencing, even payload lengths 2 through 512, gateway refresh limits including 44 Hz for DMX512, unicast ArtDmx to discovered subscribers, periodic ArtPoll discovery, and optional ArtSync after multiple unicast universes. Nodes return to asynchronous mode after four seconds without ArtSync. These rules belong in a transport worker downstream of a deterministic renderer.
